title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at RMZ Corp

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at RMZ Corp
jsonLd.description:
RMZ Corp has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About RMZ Corp:
RMZ Corp is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RMZ Corp!
